diagnosis: The player spent ~48 seconds holding right on a flat floor at y=882 with zero vertical traversal, zero deaths, and zero falls, killing only 4 enemies along a 7000+ pixel horizontal stretch. The trace shows a single brief elevation change around x=1779–2464 (a small hill) before returning to the same flat baseline for the remaining 5000+ pixels. The exit at row 3 (~96px) is vertically disconnected from the spawn floor at row 26 (~832px) with no ladders, climbable walls, or vertical pathways visible in the CSV. The player never reached the exit, never fell, and disengaged at x≈7388 after prolonged monotonous walking. This confirms the level is a pure horizontal grind with no structural variety or verticality.
